name: medcloud-sftp-poller
description: MedCloud Availity SFTP poller — 835/999/277 EDI ingestion

scripts.package: npm install --omit=dev && zip -r sftp-poller.zip index.mjs node_modules/ && echo 'Packaged: sftp-poller.zip'
scripts.deploy: npm run package && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name medcloud-sftp-poller --zip-file fileb://sftp-poller.zip --region us-east-1
